Decision Intelligence with AI

A static reading edition of 17 selected notebooks, converted into chapter pages for easy browsing, printing, and sequential reading.

Start reading Browse chapters

Contents

Chapters 1A-3D

1A Introducing the Decision Intelligence Framework A readable introduction to decisions, decision quality, and the Decision Intelligence Framework. 1B Decision Framing How to shape the decision problem before evaluating options or recommendations. 1C Gathering Intelligence Reducing uncertainty with data, evidence, historical context, and generative AI support. 1D Decision Execution The bridge between choosing and acting, including forms of execution and accountability. 1E Decision Execution with Intuition When intuition helps, when it fails, and how it fits into systematic decision work. 1F Decision Execution with Decision Rules Reusable rules, heuristics, and domain-specific patterns for consistent decisions. 1G Decision Execution with Quantitative Methods Using probability, measurement, and simulation to make better quantitative choices. 1H Decision Communication Communicating decisions so people understand the conclusion, rationale, and action. 1I Applying the Decision Intelligence Framework An end-to-end example that brings the framework components together. 1J Enterprise Decision Intelligence How decision systems become repeatable, observable, explainable, and scalable. 2A Code Execution Requirements Static reading edition generated from the Code Execution Requirements notebook. 2B About Microsoft AI Extensions Static reading edition generated from the About Microsoft AI Extensions notebook. 2C Microsoft Agent Framework Static reading edition generated from the Microsoft Agent Framework notebook. 3A Simple Decision Prompts Static reading edition generated from the Simple Decision Prompts notebook. 3B Decisions with Chat Completions & Responses APIs Static reading edition generated from the Decisions with Chat Completions & Responses APIs notebook. 3C Decisions with Reusable Prompts and Native .NET Functions Static reading edition generated from the Decisions with Reusable Prompts and Native .NET Functions notebook. 3D Private AI Decision Intelligence Static reading edition generated from the Private AI Decision Intelligence notebook.
